sections.paragraph:
verb לקלות

to toast; burn, roast

verb להיקלות

be toasted; roasted, burnt

verb להקל

to relieve; facilitate; lighten; underestimate, despise

verb הוקל

be relieved; facilitated; lightened

adjective

easy, jammy; light (not heavy) , mild, slight; simple; swift, facile, tripping
